privileged_info_summary: All four papers referenced in the task are real, published papers from authoritative sources. The metadata claims are correct: (1) 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani et al., 2017) is a conference paper published in NeurIPS 2017 proceedings; (2) 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks' (Krizhevsky et al., 2012) is a conference paper published in NIPS 2012 proceedings; (3) 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' (He et al., 2016) is a conference paper published in CVPR 2016 proceedings; (4) 'Mastering the Game of Go with Deep Neural Networks and Tree Search' (Silver et al., 2016) is a journal article published in Nature volume 529. The data is not synthetic but sourced from real academic publications. All expected item type classifications in the metadata are correct.
